user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the feedback and grievance email template list, so that I can confirm the template is configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view the Feedback / Grievance email template, so that I can review the message employees receive
acceptance_criteria: Given the feedback email templates are listed; When I click View on the Feedback / Grievance Email template row; Then its content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the feedback email templates list, so that I always see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Notification Templates view for feedback, so that I can manage the notification channel as well
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates are shown
